title: Elemental Races
description: Mod that adds 6 different races to your expiriences! Create a fun SMP with your friends!
body:
This Mod is currently in development. It would be great if you tested it and wrote your feedback.

 

 

The Minecraft mod you've created introduces 6 new races to the game, each with their unique abilities and characteristics. The Void race is the master of the darkness, allowing them to manipulate shadows and move undetected. The Fire race can withstand heat and flames and shoot fireballs, while the Ice race has mastery over frost and ice, able to freeze enemies and create pathways on water. The Earth race is strong and durable, able to lift heavy objects and create earthquakes. The Wind race is agile and fast, with the ability to glide and create powerful gusts of wind. Finally, the Light race is pure and radiant, able to mine and attack at the speed of light!

Playing this mod is best done with friends or on an SMP server, as the new races can work together to overcome challenges and create a unique experience. Forge 1.19.2 is the required version for this mod, and it's recommended to make sure that all players are using the same version to ensure compatibility. With these new races added to the game, players can explore Minecraft in a whole new way, discovering new ways to interact with the world and each other. (thx chatgpt).

 

 

Mod adds:

- 6 new armour sets

- 6 new biomes

- 6 new mobs

-18 new weapons (6 of them with abilities)

- new items, ingots, essences.

 

Commands:

/race <player> <race> (races: Void, Fire, Ice, Earth, Wind, Light) - set a race of a player

/raceanticheat <@e or the name of the player> - check if players use not their race's items.
